title: Crunchy Indulgent Egyptian Butter Stir-fry
description: A luxurious dish featuring whole black peppercorns, cooked with butter and served as a dessert.
instructions: Place the prunes in a saucepan and cover with water. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer for about 10 minutes.
Drain the prunes and add them back into the pan with the date syrup and vanilla extract. Cook over medium-low heat until the mixture thickens, stirring occasionally.
In a separate saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat. Add the black peppercorns and cook for about 30 seconds to toast.
Add the prunes to the melted butter and mix well. Remove from heat and serve immediately with cocoa powder on top.
Serve this dish as an indulgent dessert.
